commit.message:
Some style/placement adjustments to reduce diff delta

Signed-off-by: Jonathan Dowland <jdowland@redhat.com>

Back out changes to ostream.{cpp,hpp} (stringStream)

Since we are not calling stringStream from the cgroups code, don't
apply the changes to it from 8225225 or 8313083.

Signed-off-by: Jonathan Dowland <jdowland@redhat.com>

Remove use of stringStream from cgroupSubsystem_linux

Revert the file path handling to the prior method.

Signed-off-by: Jonathan Dowland <jdowland@redhat.com>

8298730: Refactor subsystem_file_line_contents and add docs and tests
